description_for_human: Find leads, enrich with OSINT, generate AI messages, and send DMs on Instagram/Twitter/LinkedIn.
description_for_model: LeadAPI provides tools to scrape Google Maps for local business leads, enrich them with OSINT data (emails, employees, subdomains, tech stack), analyze social profiles (Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn), generate AI-powered personalized outreach messages using GPT-4o-mini, and automate DM delivery via browser automation. Authenticate all requests with x-api-key header using a key prefixed sk_live_. Full workflow: leads/find → leads/intelligence → messages/generate → messages/send. Credentials must be saved via /api/v1/credentials before sending messages.
